title: Finding the Slope
text: Use the slope formula $$m=\frac{y2-y1}{x2-x1}$$ to calculate the slope $$m$$.

title: Undefined Slope
text: $$m=\frac{y2-y1}{x2-x1}$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{b+1-1}{a-a}$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{1}{0}$$. The slope is undefined because division by zero occurs. This indicates a vertical line.

title: Creating the Equation
text: Since both points have the same x-coordinate (a), the equation is: $$x=a$$.
